subject: paswater auto is buried on a shared domain
body:
Hi Daryl,

I came across Paswater Automotive while looking at ASE-certified shops in North Vernon. A+ BBB rating and 19 years in business is solid.

But your site is on radiusccc5.com -- a shared third-party domain that looks like hundreds of other shops. Google doesn't give you credit for that. People searching for auto repair in North Vernon probably aren't finding you.

I'll put together a quick plan showing exactly where you stand vs. your local competitors and what's keeping you buried. Takes me about 10 minutes.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
